_notes: City Kit Commercial. Scale 9 (75% of the 12 m city-road module; building-a ~11 m, skyscraper-a ~26 m). low-detail-* is the distant-skyline set (scale_mul 10 -> effective 90, sized to read on the horizon) and detail-* are facade decorations (awnings/overhangs/parasols). Parasols get a per-asset scale_mul 0.5 (halved) and a box so they read as touchable street furniture; other details stay none. building-a/-c carry hand-tightened collision boxes and are `manual` (the generator leaves their .tscn alone).
